title: Q4 Rally Runs Out Of Steam
section_path: Q4 Rally Runs Out Of Steam
section_path_text: Q4 Rally Runs Out Of Steam
summary:
Main
Mideast Gulf to China VLCC (TD3C) climbed from $24,373/day on 7 November to $37,616/day on 19 November, its highest level since 9 October but had fallen back to $32,721/day on 21 November. Chinese crude oil imports were below 2023's level every month this year from February to October, according to Vortexa data. Since June, TD3C has been rangebound between $20,000/day and $40,000/day.
